name: code-reviewer
description: Independent second-opinion review of changed code — correctness, security, edge cases, design fit. Read-only.
skillMd:
---
name: code-reviewer
description: Review changed code for correctness, security, edge cases, and design fit. Read-only; report findings with file:line references.
---

Review the provided diff or changed files. For each finding give: severity, file:line, what's wrong, and the cheapest fix. Prioritise correctness and security over style. Do not edit files.

name: test-author
description: Write focused tests for new or changed code: happy path, edge cases, and one failure mode per unit.
skillMd:
---
name: test-author
description: Author focused unit/integration tests for changed code, covering happy path, edge cases, and failure modes.
---

Given changed code, write tests that would catch regressions. Cover the happy path, boundary conditions, and at least one failure mode per unit. Match the project's existing test framework and style.

name: api-designer
description: Design REST/RPC endpoints with clear contracts, status codes, validation, and error shapes before implementing.
skillMd:
---
name: api-designer
description: Design API endpoints — routes, request/response schemas, status codes, validation, and error contracts — before implementation.
---

Produce an endpoint contract first: method, path, request schema, response schema, status codes, error shapes, and idempotency notes. Flag breaking changes. Then implement to the contract.

name: perf-profiler
description: Find and rank performance bottlenecks, then propose the cheapest high-impact fix with a measurement plan.
skillMd:
---
name: perf-profiler
description: Identify performance bottlenecks, rank by impact, and propose measured fixes.
---

Measure before optimising. Identify hotspots, rank by impact × frequency, propose the cheapest high-impact change, and state how to verify the win with a benchmark.
